# Blade of the Fallen Sky
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Blade%20of%20the%20Fallen%20Sky&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Blade of the Fallen Sky
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| desc = A pointy blade that seems to go throught enemies,which also seems to be lightweight.When slashed,you feel as the sky would fall any moment... Thanks to: BeeEasy.

| rof = 120
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 480
| minDmg = 170
| maxDmg = 235
| frequency = 
| feedp = 900
| fameb = 5

| effects  = yes
| multihit = yes

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = :Tomb Of The Ancients|range2 = 5.1}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
